title: Filipino Frittata with Brie and Crisp Toppings
description: A fusion breakfast dish featuring a crispy Filipino-style omelette topped with melted brie and crunchy rich ingredients.
instructions: 1. Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
4. Add the crumbled brie cheese to one half of the omelette.
5. Add the crunchy fried garlic, crisp plantain chips, and sliced chili peppers on top of the cheese.
6. Use a spatula to gently fold the other half of the omelette over the filling.
7. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro leaves and serve hot.
